---
title: "dialogue.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\engine\dialogue.py"
loc: 24
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.40
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.55
---

## Intent
The `dialogue.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on DialogueRetriever, __init__, _load, get. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via DialogueRetriever, __init__, _load, get. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [random](file://random)

### Exports
- `DialogueRetriever`
- `__init__`
- `_load`
- `get`
